artifacts.role: root agent rule distinguishing generated PHP compatibility quality from idiomatic Haxe source design
durable rationale for using modern Haxe features, macros, and typed abstractions while preserving WordPress parity

validation_result.generated_php_quality_rule: Generated PHP and public adapters must preserve WordPress 7.0 ABI and ecosystem compatibility.
validation_result.haxe_source_quality_rule: Haxe source should be idiomatic modern Haxe and may improve structure through types, macros, and abstractions when parity evidence protects behavior.
